proposed_status_row.paper_title: The performance of forecast-based monetary policy rules under model uncertainty
proposed_status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/The Performance of Forecast-Based Monetary Policy Rules under Model Uncertainty.pdf
proposed_status_row.formula_quality: core printed equations legible; private optimization primitives and AL law not printed
proposed_status_row.steady_state_quality: linearized gap steady state documented; adaptive-learning initialization deferred
proposed_status_row.notes: Shared catalog.csv and status.csv were not edited by instruction. The AL-specific variant is identified from MMB implementation metadata only.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
model = 'NK_LWW03AL'
base = Path('data/model_archive/mmb_derivations') / model
en = (base / f'{model}_derivation.en.md').read_text()
zh = (base / f'{model}_derivation.zh.md').read_text()
assert all(f'## {i}.' in en for i in range(1, 9))
assert re.search(r'\(F1\)', en)
assert len(re.findall(r'\(F\d+\)', en)) == len(re.findall(r'\(F\d+\)', zh))
print('archive_entry_checks_ok')
print('f_number_counts_match')
PY
results: source_manifest.json parsed successfully with python3 -m json.tool
worker_report.json parsed successfully with python3 -m json.tool
English derivation contains all eight required sections and (F1)
English and Chinese F-number counts match at 65 regex matches each

unresolved_issues: Paper-side Markdown does not print household and firm optimization primitives behind the two-equation optimizing AD-AS system.
Paper-side Markdown does not derive the adaptive-learning law for NK_LWW03AL.
Exact MMB policy-rule coefficient vector mapping and adaptive-learning initialization should be reviewed against Modelbase documentation before promotion.
Runtime validation was not performed and Dynare was not run.
